specific_question: What was the average increase in battery range for all of Elexion Automotive's electric car models from 2023 to 2024?
answer: Between the 2023 and 2024 model years, the Elexion Automotive electric vehicle lineup achieved an average battery range improvement of 32 miles per charge.
